patches.hypothesis: The issue arises because the custom enum key deserializer is not being used when it should be. The existing logic does not properly handle the case where a custom key deserializer is registered via a modifier.
patches.changes: - Added a check to see if there are any custom key deserializers registered via modifiers before falling back to the standard deserialization logic.
patches.diff: - Added a check to see if there are any custom key deserializers registered via modifiers before falling back to the standard deserialization logic.
